## nsc auth generate-dev-token

Generate a Namespace Cloud token for development purposes.

```
nsc auth generate-dev-token [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for generate-dev-token
      --output_to string   If specified, write the access token to this path.
```
